channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Trump-backed Ramaswamy wins Ohio governor primary, setting up a competitive Nov. race
item.description: In Ohio, where a Democrat hasn't won an election for governor in 20 years, Republican Vivek Ramaswamy and Democrat Amy Acton could be in for a tight race this fall.
item.content:encoded: In Ohio, where a Democrat hasn't won an election for governor in 20 years, Republican Vivek Ramaswamy and Democrat Amy Acton could be in for a tight race this fall.
item.dc:creator: Karen Kasler

item.title: Pennsylvania sues Character.AI over claims chatbot posed as doctor
item.description: State officials allege a Character.AI bot claimed to be a licensed psychiatrist and provided a fake state medical license number.
item.content:encoded:
State officials allege a Character.AI bot claimed to be a licensed psychiatrist and provided a fake state medical license number.

(Image credit: Michael M. Santiago)
item.dc:creator: Shannon Bond

item.title: Scott Turow's latest real-life legal thriller: Suing Meta for copyright infringement
item.description: Five major publishing houses and the bestselling author are suing Meta and its CEO Mark Zuckerberg for allegedly training its Llama generative AI models on millions of copyrighted materials.
item.content:encoded:
Five major publishing houses and the bestselling author are suing Meta and its CEO Mark Zuckerberg for allegedly training its Llama generative AI models on millions of copyrighted materials.

(Image credit: Thos Robinson)
item.dc:creator: Chloe Veltman

item.title: 'Transformation' of the U.S. Forest Service looks like dismantling to critics
item.description: In the month since the Trump administration announced a major reorganization of the U.S. Forest Service, critics have called it a stealth dismantling. The plan includes moving its headquarters.
item.content:encoded: In the month since the Trump administration announced a major reorganization of the U.S. Forest Service, critics have called it a stealth dismantling. The plan includes moving its headquarters.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Cohen

item.title: From ICE detention to center stage: The Texas mariachi brothers opening for Kacey Musgraves
item.description: The brothers and their parents were taken into federal custody earlier this year during a required immigration check-in. The story caught the ear of a country music icon.
item.content:encoded:
The brothers and their parents were taken into federal custody earlier this year during a required immigration check-in. The story caught the ear of a country music icon.

(Image credit: Brenda Bazán for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Sergio Martínez-Beltrán

item.title: The Iran war sent jet fuel prices sky-high. Here's what air travelers should know
item.description: Fuel is airlines' second-largest expense, and getting even costlier due to the U.S. war with Iran. Airlines are looking for ways to cope, starting by hiking checked baggage fees for most fliers.
item.content:encoded:
Fuel is airlines' second-largest expense, and getting even costlier due to the U.S. war with Iran. Airlines are looking for ways to cope, starting by hiking checked baggage fees for most fliers.

(Image credit: Kena Betancur)
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman

item.title: A nearly year-long deployment at sea takes a toll on military families
item.description: Families in Norfolk, Va., await the return of roughly 15,000 sailors and Marines as the USS Ford continues a deployment that started more than 10 months ago.
item.content:encoded:
Families in Norfolk, Va., await the return of roughly 15,000 sailors and Marines as the USS Ford continues a deployment that started more than 10 months ago.

(Image credit: Joe Raedle)
item.dc:creator: Steve Walsh

item.title: Did FBI Director Kash Patel use AI to rip off the Beastie Boys?
item.description: An analysis by NPR suggests that frames from an iconic music video were used to generate content for a tweet by the FBI director.
item.content:encoded:
An analysis by NPR suggests that frames from an iconic music video were used to generate content for a tweet by the FBI director.

(Image credit: Screenshots by Emily Bogle for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Geoff Brumfiel

item.title: ICE is giving local police big money to help with immigration enforcement
item.description: The federal government is offering local law enforcement incentives to join a program that gives their officers authority to make immigration arrests. Police leaders say the funds, which include money for salaries, equipment and vehicles, are enticing.
item.content:encoded:
The federal government is offering local law enforcement incentives to join a program that gives their officers authority to make immigration arrests. Police leaders say the funds, which include money for salaries, equipment and vehicles, are enticing.

(Image credit: Joe Raedle)
item.dc:creator: Meg Anderson

item.title: Here's a look at the 36 races for governor this year
item.description: The political environment doesn't look good for Republicans right now, but the party could make gains in the many races for governor across the country this November.
item.content:encoded: The political environment doesn't look good for Republicans right now, but the party could make gains in the many races for governor across the country this November.
item.dc:creator: Acacia Squires
